早上好，夜之城！昨天死人乐透最后的结果是满打满算三十个，当然不算下水道里的臭老鼠...
我叫陈默，本来只是一个苟活与夜之城最低端的鼹鼠，做着挖尸体义体的活计讨口饭吃，直到我遇到了那个破AI，她藏在我脑子里，就像得了赛博精神病，还有那个聋哑女孩...
凭什么新生命能把普通人当成药？我活着的意义究竟是什么？我明白了，我全都明白了！
我摧毁了新生命的计划，但还有荒坂，我见到了V，荒坂集团，一只地底下的老鼠来找你了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od97658eed594e8f410d5b4fa0182b372~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"墨江铃鸭","author_id":"","book_id":"7606740341223345176","book_name":"赛博朋克2077：下水道的鼹鼠","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1549人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7606740417022804504","read_count":"1549","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"146076"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"65","tags":"科幻末世,都市,赛博朋克,单女主,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2od97658eed594e8f410d5b4fa0182b372~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779286335&x-signature=cNVhKSVqFSeeLOJ%2B7Ob%2FOx0lkfs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1121950523473278","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"48"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321221214C91C7ABF62F55B390879"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读51分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3051,"reply_count":1,"sho
